content.text: based on what you've told us previously, mira settled best **swaddled on her back** as a young baby — that was the position you noted worked most reliably for her. you dropped the swaddle at **5 months**, which lines up with the window most families use before rolling becomes a real possibility. if you ever want to jot down any other details from those early months for the record, just say the word and i'll save them.
